message:
feat(runtime,beads): add integration docs and tests, initialize beads issue tracker

- ft-runtime/lib.rs: add comprehensive documentation for
  asupersync_infinite_budget() and frankentui_default_style() integration
  functions explaining their purpose and feature-gate requirements
- ft-runtime/lib.rs: add feature-gated integration tests for both
  asupersync and frankentui integration points with test guidance comments
- .gitignore: stop ignoring .beads/ directory so issue tracker is
  version-controlled alongside the project
- Initialize beads issue tracker with config, metadata, and issues JSONL

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+# Database
+*.db
+*.db-journal
+*.db-shm
+*.db-wal
+
+# Lock files
+*.lock
+
+# Temporary
+last-touched
+*.tmp
+
+# Local history backups
+.br_history/
+
+# Sync state (local-only, per-machine)
+.sync.lock
+sync_base.jsonl
+
+# Merge artifacts (temporary files from 3-way merge)
+beads.base.jsonl
+beads.base.meta.json
+beads.left.jsonl
+beads.left.meta.json
+beads.right.jsonl
+beads.right.meta.json
+
+# Daemon runtime files
+daemon.lock
+daemon.log
+daemon.pid
+bd.sock
+sync-state.json
+
+# Worktree redirect file
+redirect
+
+# bv (beads viewer) lock file
+.bv.lock

@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Beads Project Configuration
+# issue_prefix: frankentorch
+# default_priority: 2
+# default_type: task

@@ -21,7 +21,6 @@ __pycache__/
 
 # Local agent/tool caches
 .bv/
-.beads/
 perf.data
 perf.data.*
 frankentorch_illustration.png
